svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="ApexMaths pipeline architecture" scale="1" border="20"> <diagram name="Question Generation Pipeline" id="qgen-pipeline-arch"> <mxGraphModel dx="1868" dy="1012" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1760" pageHeight="1280" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=22;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#111111;" value="ApexMaths — Question Generation Pipeline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="760" x="40" y="24" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=13;fontColor=#555555;" value="Offline, adversarial, human-gated factory that fills the production question bank. Three independent model families propose; deterministic code judges; a human disposes." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="980" x="40" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="operator" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;shape=mxgraph.aws3.users;fillColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="53" width="56" x="70" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="operatorLbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#232F3E;" value="Engineer / Operator
(runs the CLI, resumable)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="120" x="40" y="178" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="seedsIn" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=16;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontColor=#000000;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="handoff/questions.json
<b>Seed bank</b> — human-vetted 11+ questions
(the SAME schema the app consumes)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="40" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="store" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=14;fillColor=#FFE6CC;strokeColor=#D79B00;fontColor=#000000;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b>Per-question artifacts</b>
(local JSON, one file per qid)
synthetic/generated/
synthetic/inspected/
synthetic/adjudicated/
<i>idempotent · resumable</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="220" x="40" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="laneLbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#444444;" value="pipeline/ — Python stages (one network module only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="300" x="350" y="98" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#232F3E;strokeColor=#232F3E;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="<b>Stage 1 · seed_selector.py</b>
pick figure-less seeds
assign stable ordinals (q-m6-NNN)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="300" x="350" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#232F3E;strokeColor=#232F3E;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="<b>Stage 2 · generate_questions.py</b>
5 questions per seed (difficulty 1–5)
text + 5 options + flagged answer + solution" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="300" x="350" y="226" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#232F3E;strokeColor=#B12704;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;strokeWidth=3;" value="<b>Stage 3 · inspect_questions.py</b>
🔒 THE FIREWALL
cold_solve(text, options) — <b>NO correctIndex</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="300" x="350" y="322" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1B7A43;strokeColor=#0B5A2E;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="<b>Stage 4 · synthetic_match.py</b> (pure, inline)
deterministic answer → option index
letter · exact · loose · numeric tiers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="350" y="424" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#232F3E;strokeColor=#232F3E;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="<b>Stage 5 · adjudicate_questions.py</b>
tie-breaker — <b>only</b> on disagreement
or ambiguity (else no call)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="300" x="350" y="514" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1B7A43;strokeColor=#0B5A2E;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="<b>Stage 6 · synthetic_dedup.py</b> (pure)
near-duplicate detection in-batch
advisory only — nothing is dropped" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="350" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFB000;strokeColor=#B12704;fontColor=#000000;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;strokeWidth=3;" value="<b>Stage 7 · synthetic_triage.py</b> (pure)
⚖️ green / flagged verdict — <b>OUR CODE</b>
never read from a model · never auto-rejects" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="300" x="350" y="696" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1B7A43;strokeColor=#0B5A2E;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="<b>Stage 8 · build_m6_review.py</b> (pure join)
join all evidence + verdict + duplicates
→ review-bundle.json" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="300" x="350" y="788" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="region" parent="1" style="points=[[0,0],[0.25,0],[0.5,0],[0.75,0],[1,0],[1,0.25],[1,0.5],[1,0.75],[1,1],[0.75,1],[0.5,1],[0.25,1],[0,1],[0,0.75],[0,0.5],[0,0.25]];outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;container=1;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_region;strokeColor=#00A4A6;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#147EBA;dashed=1;" value="AWS Region — eu-west-2 (London)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="470" width="600" x="760" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bedrockGroup" parent="region" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=#F0FBFA;strokeColor=#01A88D;fontColor=#147060;arcSize=4;" value="Amazon Bedrock — Converse API (text-only)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="390" width="520" x="40" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bedrockIcon" parent="bedrockGroup" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#01A88D;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.bedrock;" value="Bedrock" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="64" x="226" y="34" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mGen" parent="bedrockGroup" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FCE8D5;strokeColor=#D97A2B;fontColor=#5a3210;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;" value="<b>Generator</b> — Anthropic Claude Opus
authors a new question, options,
its own answer + worked solution" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="440" x="40" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mInsp" parent="bedrockGroup" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6F2FB;strokeColor=#2E73B8;fontColor=#143b5e;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;" value="<b>Inspector</b> — DeepSeek (reasoning)
re-solves COLD from stem + options only
never sees the proposed answer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="440" x="40" y="204" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mAdj" parent="bedrockGroup" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EFE8FB;strokeColor=#7A4FD6;fontColor=#3a2370;fontSize=11;arcSize=10;" value="<b>Adjudicator</b> — Qwen (reasoning)
independent tie-breaker / ambiguity judge
invoked only when the first two disagree" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="440" x="40" y="288" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="netNote" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontStyle=2;fontColor=#147EBA;" value="bedrock_text_client.py — the ONLY network module
3 distinct families ⇒ no single model's blind spot passes unchecked" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="560" x="770" y="612" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="hitlBand" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fillColor=#F4F1FB;strokeColor=#3F51B5;fontColor=#283593;arcSize=2;dashed=1;" value="Human-in-the-loop review & handoff" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="320" width="1320" x="40" y="905" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bundle" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=16;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontColor=#000000;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="synthetic/review-bundle.json
evidence + triage verdict + duplicates
(green pre-approved · flagged = null)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="280" x="350" y="950" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reviewer" parent="1" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;shape=mxgraph.aws3.user;fillColor=#3F51B5;gradientColor=none;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="53" width="48" x="110" y="1070" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reviewerLbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#283593;" value="Human Reviewer
(the answer authority)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="120" x="74" y="1124" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reviewApp" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#3F51B5;strokeColor=#283593;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="<b>Review UI</b> — review_app/m6.html + m6.js
static, served at localhost:8000
per-question evidence · edit · approve/reject
<i>blocks rubber-stamping a flagged item</i>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="320" x="250" y="1060" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decisions" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=16;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#D6B656;fontColor=#000000;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="review/m6-decisions.json
(exported decisions)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="220" x="660" y="1066" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="buildHandoff" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1B7A43;strokeColor=#0B5A2E;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;arcSize=8;" value="<b>build_handoff.py</b>
validate schema · approved-only
(topic, difficulty 1–5, in-range answer)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="280" x="660" y="950" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="handoffOut" parent="1" style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;size=16;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82B366;fontColor=#000000;fontSize=11;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="handoff/questions.json
<b>deliverable bank</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="200" x="980" y="952" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="aurora" parent="1" style="sketch=0;points=[[0,0,0],[0.25,0,0],[0.5,0,0],[0.75,0,0],[1,0,0],[0,1,0],[0.25,1,0],[0.5,1,0],[0.75,1,0],[1,1,0],[0,0.25,0],[0,0.5,0],[0,0.75,0],[1,0.25,0],[1,0.5,0],[1,0.75,0]];outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;fillColor=#C925D1;strokeColor=#ffffff;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=11;aspect=fixed;shape=mxgraph.aws4.resourceIcon;resIcon=mxgraph.aws4.rds;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="72" width="72" x="1240" y="952" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="auroraLbl" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#7A1F86;" value="<b>ApexMaths · Amazon Aurora PostgreSQL</b>
questions table (seeded by the app)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="180" x="1190" y="1028" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f_seed_s1" edge="1" parent="1" source="seedsIn" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.3;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="s1" value="read seeds"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell </mxCell> <mxCell id="f12" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;" target="s2" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;" target="s7" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f78" edge="1" parent="1" source="s7" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#333333;" target="s8" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cGen" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" </mxCell> <mxCell id="cInsp" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="endArrow=classic;startArrow=classic;html=1;strokeColor=#2E73B8;fontSize=10;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" target="mInsp" rect.style: fill: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff);

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 37px; margin-left: 24px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #111111;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111111, #dfdfdf); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 65px; margin-left: 24px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #555555;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#555555, #a4a4a4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: Offline, adversarial, human-gated factory that fills the production question bank. Three independent model families propose; deterministic code judges; a human disposes.

switch.text: Offline, adversarial, human-gated factory that fills the production question bank. Three independent model families propose; deterministic code judges;...

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 191px; margin-left: 82px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #232F3E;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#232F3E, #bdc7d4); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 286px; margin-left: 23px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
handoff/questions.json
Seed bank — human-vetted 11+ questions
(the SAME schema the app consumes)

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 230, 204), rgb(54, 33, 10)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(215, 155, 0), rgb(153, 101, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 643px; margin-left: 23px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Per-question artifacts
(local JSON, one file per qid)
synthetic/generated/
synthetic/inspected/
synthetic/adjudicated/
idempotent · resumable

switch.text: pipeline/ — Python stages (one network module only)

div.div:
Stage 1 · seed_selector.py
pick figure-less seeds
assign stable ordinals (q-m6-NNN)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 254px; margin-left: 333px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 2 · generate_questions.py
5 questions per seed (difficulty 1–5)
text + 5 options + flagged answer + solution

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(177, 39, 4), rgb(255, 158, 128));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 353px; margin-left: 333px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #ffffff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 11px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#ffffff, #121212); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Stage 3 · inspect_questions.py
🔒 THE FIREWALL
cold_solve(text, options) — NO correctIndex

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(27, 122, 67), rgb(92, 174, 126)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(11, 90, 46), rgb(126, 194, 156));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 450px; margin-left: 333px;

div.div:
Stage 4 · synthetic_match.py (pure, inline)
deterministic answer → option index
letter · exact · loose · numeric tiers

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(35, 47, 62), rgb(189, 199, 212));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 542px; margin-left: 333px;

div.div:
Stage 5 · adjudicate_questions.py
tie-breaker — only on disagreement
or ambiguity (else no call)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(27, 122, 67), rgb(92, 174, 126)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(11, 90, 46), rgb(126, 194, 156));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 636px; margin-left: 333px;

div.div:
Stage 6 · synthetic_dedup.py (pure)
near-duplicate detection in-batch
advisory only — nothing is dropped

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 176, 0), rgb(147, 79, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(177, 39, 4), rgb(255, 158, 128));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 298px; height: 1px; padding-top: 725px; margin-left: 333px;

div.div:
Stage 7 · synthetic_triage.py (pure)
⚖️ green / flagged verdict — OUR CODE
never read from a model · never auto-rejects

join all evidence + verdict + duplicates
→ review-bundle.json
